description_long: This is an adult male figure with a stylized, spiky hairstyle and a distinctive mask covering the face, giving a mysterious or possibly intimidating appearance. He is dressed in a casual, sporty outfit consisting of a zip-up jacket with gradient blue sleeves, a visible undershirt, and cropped pants with side pockets. The figure's footwear consists of open-toed flip-flops, and there are visible tattoo-like markings on the lower legs. The overall build is athletic, and the hands are relaxed at the sides. The clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and ease of movement, suitable for urban or street environments. The mask and tattoos add a unique, possibly urban or subcultural flair to the character.
description: Athletic adult male with a spiky hairstyle, mask, blue zip-up jacket, cropped pants, and flip-flops, featuring visible leg tattoos and a relaxed stance.
description_view_0: Front view shows the mask, spiky hairstyle, blue jacket, undershirt, cropped pants, flip-flops, and leg tattoos.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the blue sleeve gradient, side profile of the mask, and tattoo details on the left leg.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the spiky hairstyle, jacket, pants, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the blue sleeve, mask profile, and right leg tattoo details.
attribute_clothing_type: casual zip-up jacket, undershirt, cropped pants, and open-toed footwear
